use_codes.desc: MAINTENANCE TREATMENT OF ASTHMA AS PROPHYLACTIC THERAPY IN ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS SIX YEARS OF AGE OR OLDER, INCLUDING PATIENTS REQUIRING ORAL CORTICOSTEROID THERAPY FOR ASTHMA

indications.text:
PULMICORT FLEXHALER is indicated for the maintenance
treatment of asthma as prophylactic therapy in adult and
pediatric patients six years of age or older. It is also indicated
for patients requiring oral corticosteroid therapy for asthma.

1.1 Treatment of Asthma
PULMICORT FLEXHALER is indicated for the maintenance treatment of asthma as prophylactic therapy in patients six
years of age or older.
Limitations of Use:
 PULMICORT FLEXHALER is NOT indicated for the relief of acute bronchospasm.
